tabs.content:
.create-or-alter table Flights (
    flight_id: int, flight_number: string,
    origin_code: string, origin_city: string,
    destination_code: string, destination_city: string,
    scheduled_departure: datetime, actual_departure: datetime,
    scheduled_arrival: datetime, actual_arrival: datetime,
    aircraft_type: string, flight_status: string, delay_minutes: int
)
tabs.title: Tab
